testcase.name: test_admin_login

failure.message: AssertionError: No token in admin login response assert 'token' in {'access_token': 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJiNDYyOGUzZS05ZGVjLTQyZWYtOGM3NS1kY2JhMDgxOTRjZDIiLCJlbWFpbCI6ImlhbUByeWFuc2FsdmFkb3IuY29tIiwicm9sZSI6Im1hc3Rlcl9hZG1pbiIsImV4cCI6MTc3MTgyNjEzM30.E1-oAYQHrdirRTwkX4fyzAwBzmvLBWiTcENAsCKqxbQ', 'token_type': 'bearer', 'user': {'allowed_dashboards': ['dashboard', 'profit_tracker', 'trade_monitor', 'habits', 'affiliate', 'profile'], 'created_at': '2026-01-10T09:23:24.715077+00:00', 'email': 'iam@ryansalvador.com', 'full_name': 'Ryan Salvador', ...}}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration_116_seven_bugs.py:40: in test_admin_login assert "token" in data, "No token in admin login response" E AssertionError: No token in admin login response E assert 'token' in {'access_token': 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJiNDYyOGUzZS05ZGVjLTQyZWYtOGM3NS1kY2JhMDgxOTRjZDIiLCJlbWFpbCI6ImlhbUByeWFuc2FsdmFkb3IuY29tIiwicm9sZSI6Im1hc3Rlcl9hZG1pbiIsImV4cCI6MTc3MTgyNjEzM30.E1-oAYQHrdirRTwkX4fyzAwBzmvLBWiTcENAsCKqxbQ', 'token_type': 'bearer', 'user': {'allowed_dashboards': ['dashboard', 'profit_tracker', 'trade_monitor', 'habits', 'affiliate', 'profile'], 'created_at': '2026-01-10T09:23:24.715077+00:00', 'email': 'iam@ryansalvador.com', 'full_name': 'Ryan Salvador', ...}}

testcase.name: test_licensee_login

failure.message: AssertionError: No token in licensee login response assert 'token' in {'access_token': 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiIxOWNjYjlkNy0xMzlmLTQ5MTgtYTY2Mi1hZDcyNDgzMDEwYjEiLCJlbWFpbCI6InJpenphLm1pbGVzQGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJvbGUiOiJtZW1iZXIiLCJleHAiOjE3NzE4MjYxMzR9.Pa1hfe0CY3EySeKdQdxbKr-j4u3lAEWViNe0dNBuceg', 'token_type': 'bearer', 'user': {'allowed_dashboards': ['dashboard', 'profit_tracker', 'trade_monitor', 'habits', 'affiliate', 'profile'], 'created_at': '2026-01-10T10:00:00+00:00', 'email': 'rizza.miles@gmail.com', 'full_name': 'Rizza Miles', ...}}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration_116_seven_bugs.py:52: in test_licensee_login assert "token" in data, "No token in licensee login response" E AssertionError: No token in licensee login response E assert 'token' in {'access_token': 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiIxOWNjYjlkNy0xMzlmLTQ5MTgtYTY2Mi1hZDcyNDgzMDEwYjEiLCJlbWFpbCI6InJpenphLm1pbGVzQGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJvbGUiOiJtZW1iZXIiLCJleHAiOjE3NzE4MjYxMzR9.Pa1hfe0CY3EySeKdQdxbKr-j4u3lAEWViNe0dNBuceg', 'token_type': 'bearer', 'user': {'allowed_dashboards': ['dashboard', 'profit_tracker', 'trade_monitor', 'habits', 'affiliate', 'profile'], 'created_at': '2026-01-10T10:00:00+00:00', 'email': 'rizza.miles@gmail.com', 'full_name': 'Rizza Miles', ...}}

testcase.name: test_profit_summary_has_dynamic_values
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration_116_seven_bugs.py:72: in test_profit_summary_has_dynamic_values assert response.status_code == 200, f"Profit summary failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Profit summary failed: {"detail":"Invalid token"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_profit_summary_actual_profit_not_zero
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration_116_seven_bugs.py:116: in test_profit_summary_actual_profit_not_zero assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration_116_seven_bugs.py:247: in test_year_projections_endpoint assert response.status_code == 200, f"Year projections failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Year projections failed: {"detail":"Invalid token"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
